{{Quote|We believe that the Jawas use psychometry to read visions inspired by contact with scavenged items|Corix Venne, elaborating on Jawa scavenging|<ref name="Galactic Hunters">{{SWGTCG|set=Galactic Hunters|cardname=Jawa Healer}}</ref>}}
'''Corix Venne''' was a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] musician<ref name="Young Jedi" /> who was seen in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}}</ref>. He later became a [[Sentientologist|cultural scientist]] and studied [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]].<ref name="Galactic Hunters" /> While in Mos Espa during [[32 BBY]], Venne wore a Coarseweave beige long sleeve tunic with a black belt with a gold buckle.<ref name="TPM" />
